entries.title: Medical Ambulance
entries.text_content: For a medical emergency requiring an ambulance in Kashmir, dial 108. For pregnancy-related emergencies or infant care, dial 102 (Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram).

entries.title: SMHS Hospital Srinagar
entries.text_content: Shri Maharaja Hari Singh (SMHS) Hospital is a major tertiary care hospital in Srinagar located in Karan Nagar. It handles general emergencies and trauma.

entries.title: SKIMS Soura
entries.text_content: Sher-i-Kashmir Institute of Medical Sciences (SKIMS) at Soura is the largest medical institute and hospital in Kashmir. It is best for critical care, specialized surgeries, and severe emergencies.

entries.title: Lal Ded (LD) Hospital
entries.text_content: Lal Ded Hospital is the premier maternity hospital in Srinagar. Go here for pregnancy-related emergencies, delivery, and gynecological issues.

entries.title: Bone and Joint Hospital Barzulla
entries.text_content: For severe fractures, orthopedic trauma, or bone-related emergencies, the Bone and Joint Hospital in Barzulla, Srinagar is the primary facility.
